SpecLanguage.language_kr:
대지 시너지 탱커 
스킬 : 같은 열의 스텔라 나이츠에게 <color=#F75D32>보호막</color>을 부여한다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Earth Synergy Tank
Skill: Grants a <color=#F75D32>shield</color> to the Stella Knights in the same row.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
물 시너지 마법사 
스킬 : 일정 범위에 <color=#F75D32>얼음을 소환해</color> 적을 공격. 
<color=#F75D32>불 시너지</color> 적에게는 추가 대미지를 준다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Water Synergy Mage
Skill: <color=#F75D32>Summons an ice</color> in a certain area to attack enemies.
Deals additional damage to <color=#F75D32>Fire Synergy</color> enemies.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
물 시너지 저격수 
스킬 : 적 1명에게 <color=#F75D32>강력한 일격</color>을 날린다. 스킬로 적을 처치하면 
스킬 쿨타임이 <color=#F75D32>즉시 초기화</color>된다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Water Synergy Ranger
Skill: Delivers a <color=#F75D32>powerful strike</color> to a single enemy.
If the skill kills the enemy, the Skill Cooldown is <color=#F75D32>immediately reset.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
어둠 시너지 암살자
스킬 : 적 1명에게 대미지를 주고, 잠시동안 침묵 상태를 부여한다. 
*침묵 : 일정 시간 스킬을 사용하지 못한다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Dark Synergy Assassin
Skill: Deals damage to a single enemy and applies silence for a short duration.
*Silence: The enemy cannot use skills for a certain period.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
불 시너지 서포터 
스킬 : 모든 아군의 <color=#F75D32>공격력</color>을 일정시간 상승시킨다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Fire Synergy Supporter
Skill: Increases the <color=#F75D32>ATK</color> of all allies for a certain period.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
불 시너지 마법사

스킬 : 3x3 범위에 <color=#F75D32>메테오 레이저</color>를 발사한다.  
마법은 바닥을 불태워 <color=#F75D32>추가 불 데미지</color>를 준다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Fire Synergy Mage

Skill : Launches a <color=#F75D32>Fire Energy Spell</color> in a 3x3 area.
The spell scorches the ground, dealing <color=#F75D32>additional damage.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
대지 시너지 저격수 
스킬 : 유탄 3발을 발사해 일정 범위의 적에게 강력한 대미지를 준다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Earth Synergy Ranger
Skill: Fires 3 grenades, dealing heavy damage to enemies in a certain area.
Don’t you worry, you are not under arrest.
I may not be the best cook, but I'm a decent maid!
I’ll handle this by the rules.
What! Got a problem with what I said?!
I actually prefer the color red.
I lost my eyes, but my senses have sharpened.
I'm glad to have met you, Commander.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 강함을 증명하는 것만큼 의미있는 건 없지!
SpecLanguage.language_en: There's nothing as meaningful as proving one's strength!
Are you afraid? Of waking up from your dreams?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아주 조용히... 잠깐 잠드는 것 뿐이니깐
SpecLanguage.language_en: Very quietly... just a brief moment of sleep

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 팔이 몇 개냐고 물으신다면, 여분까지 포함해 428개입니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: If you ask how many arms I have, I’d say 428, including spares.
With curiosity and money, anything is possible!
You are not invited to the tea party, hee-hee!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 후훗, 괜찮아요. 오늘은 그저 안부를 물으러 온 것 뿐이에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: He-he, it's okay. I’m just here to check in on you today.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 빛이 가장 필요한 건 어둠에 갇힌 이들이야.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Those trapped in darkness need the light the most.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 기분이다, 특별히 내가 만든 무기를 사용하게 해주지!
SpecLanguage.language_en: I'm feeling generous; I'll let you use a weapon I made, just this once!
I hear the voice of the wind.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 날 길들이겠다고? 재미있는 소리를 하는구나, 관측자.
SpecLanguage.language_en: You want to tame me? That's a funny thing to say, Commander.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 까, 깜작이야! 별 일도 아닌데 '어? '하지 말란말야.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Ah! You scared me! Don't make a big deal out of nothing.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 왜 무서워하는 거지이... 아주 잠깐 따끔할 뿐인데..
SpecLanguage.language_en: Why are you so scared... it'll only sting for a brief moment...
Conviction is a 'heart that holds firm belief'.
At the moment, all of our troops have been...<color=#F75D32>wiped out.</color> It's just you and me, <color=#F75D32>Commander.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이제 남은 방법은 단 하나, 관측자님이 <color=#F75D32>과거</color>로 돌아가서 다시 한 번 <color=#F75D32>미래</color>를 바꾸는 거에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Now, there's only one option left: you must return to the <color=#F75D32>past</color> and change the <color=#F75D32>future</color> again.
I believe in you, Commander. I know you can do it.

This may be sudden, but I am <color=#F75D32>Atresia,</color>
a Stella Knight from the <color=#F75D32>Pleiades.</color>
You’ve just been summoned from the future to this place, <color=#F75D32>Geofront.</color>
Don’t worry, I will help you, Commander.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: <color=#F75D32>화면 아래</color>에 있는 스텔라나이츠를 선택해 전장에 배치해보세요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Select the Stella Knights from the <color=#F75D32>bottom of the screen</color> and deploy them to the battlefield!
I heard you’re the newly appointed Commander.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 어떤 훈련 절차도 없이 바로 부임되다니...
SpecLanguage.language_en: You’ve been assigned without any proper training...

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그 자격이 되는지 제가 바로 확인해보죠.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Let me see if you truly have what it takes.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 스텔라 나이츠에게는 각자 부여된 </color>포지션 (역할)</color> 이 있어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Each Stella Knight has a designated </color>position (role).</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 필리아는 <color=#F75D32>저격수</color> 포지션으로 <color=#F75D32>멀리 떨어진 곳</color>에서 적을 공격할 수 있습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Philia is in the <color=#F75D32>Ranger</color> position and can attack enemies from a  <color=#F75D32>long distance.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그리고 저는 <color=#F75D32>가디언</color> 포지션으로 전방에서 아군을 <color=#F75D32>보호하는 역할</color>을 수행하죠.
SpecLanguage.language_en: As for me, I’m in the <color=#F75D32>Guardian</color> position, taking the <color=#F75D32>role of protecting</color> allies at the frontlines.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저로 전방의 <color=#F75D32>적을 막고</color> , 필리아를 이용해 <color=#F75D32>적을 공격</color> 해보세요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Use me to <color=#F75D32>block the enemies</color> at the front, and have Philia <color=#F75D32>attacking the enemies!</color>
I heard a new Commander has arrived!!
Why didn’t you tell me right away!?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 유니! 진정해요, 관측자님은 지금 혼란스러운 상황이에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Yuni! Calm down. The Commander is in a confused state right now.
Oh, really!? Then let me cheer you up!
I take on the role of <color=#F75D32> supporting the battle </color>of allies with <color=#F75D32>healing and buffs!</color>
My skill, <color=#F75D32>Power Up</color>, increases the <color=#F75D32>ATK!</color> of the allies!
Now, all that’s left is the <color=#F75D32>final training</color>, Commander.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이 훈련 뒤에는 바로 실전에 투입되실 거에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: After this training, you’ll be deployed straight into real combat.
Please eliminate the <color=#F75D32>final enemy</color> with Philia (Ranger) and Yuni (Supporter)!
Thank you for coming all the way to the <color=#F75D32>Flame Wastes</color>, Commander.
I am <color=#F75D32>Mensha</color>, a member of the Elpis Special Forces.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 현재 불타는 전장에서 저희 스텔라나이츠 대원이 <color=#F75D32>실종</color>되어 수색을 진행하고 있습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: We are currently conducting a search for a <color=#F75D32>missing</color> Stella Knight in the Flame Wastes.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 실종된 대원의 이름을 알 수 있을까요?
SpecLanguage.language_en: Can you tell me the name of the missing knight?
Additionally, we’ve been informed that another Stella Knight is also missing,
but it’s difficult to confirm anything at the moment.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 엘리스라면... 이전에 함께 작전을 수행한 적있는 동료에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Alice... she's a companion I’ve worked with on previous missions.
Let’s go rescue her right away, Commander!
Thank you, Commander. I will <color=#F75D32>show you the way!</color>
Oh, by the way, Commander, what is <color=#F75D32>your name?</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 관측자님, 제 포지션은 <color=#F75D32>탱커</color>로 적의 <color=#F75D32>물리 공격</color>으로부터 아군을 보호합니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: My position is <color=#F75D32>Tank</color>, and I protect allies from the enemy's <color=#F75D32>physical attacks.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 특히 저의 스킬 <color=#F75D32>가드 업</color>은 저와 같은 열의 아군에게
SpecLanguage.language_en: Especially with my skill, <color=#F75D32>Guard Up</color>, I grant
a <color=#F75D32>shield</color> to allies in the same row.
Phew, thanks to Mensha, we escaped the danger!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 앗 뜨거! 뭐야, 바닥에 용암이 흐르잖아?!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Ouch! What is this, there's lava on the ground?!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이 지역의 보스가 마법으로 <color=#F75D32>용암 지역</color>을 만들었다고 합니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: The boss of this region used his magic to create the <color=#F75D32>Lava Zone.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 용암 지역 위로 스텔라 나이츠가 올라가면
SpecLanguage.language_en: If the Stella Knights step onto the lava, they’ll take
so please be cautious when deploying us!
We almost got just roasted in it!!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아무래도 이번 지역에서는 <color=#F75D32>용암 지역</color>이 계속해서 나타날 것 같습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It seems like the <color=#F75D32>Lava Zones</color> will keep appearing in this region.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저희를 배치할 때 <color=#F75D32>용암 지역</color>이 근처에 없는지 꼭 확인해주세요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Please make sure to check that there are no <color=#F75D32>Lava Zones</color> nearby when you’re deploying us!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 어!? 이번에는 앞에 <color=#F75D32>커다란 벽</color> 같은 게 있는데!?
SpecLanguage.language_en: Huh!? Now there's a <color=#F75D32>huge wall</color> up ahead!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저 구조물은 <color=#F75D32>방해물</color>로, 앞에 방해물이 있으면 <color=#F75D32>이동이 막힙니다.</color>
SpecLanguage.language_en: That one is an <color=#F75D32>obstacle</color>, and if there is an obstacle in front of us, it will <color=#F75D32>block our movement.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 또한 방해물이 있는 곳에는 스텔라 나이츠를 <color=#F75D32>배치할 수 없습니다.</color>
SpecLanguage.language_en: Also, Stella Knights <color=#F75D32>cannot be deployed</color> where obstacles are present.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 방해물로 적의 움직임을 <color=#F75D32>유도</color>할 수도 있으니 잘 활용해시죠!
SpecLanguage.language_en: With obstacles, you can also <color=#F75D32>direct</color> the enemy’s movement, so make good use of them!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 흠... 제 공격이 <color=#F75D32>잘 안 통하는</color> 느낌이 듭니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Hmm... I feel like my attacks <color=#F75D32>are not working well.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아무래도 몬스터들의 <color=#F75D32>물리 방어력</color>이 높은 것 같아요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It seems the monsters have high <color=#F75D32>Phys DEF.</color>
In situations like this, we need <color=#F75D32>Mage’s</color> <color=#F75D32>magic attacks</color>...

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 일단 계속 전진해보죠! 분명 방법이 있을거에요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Let’s keep moving forward! I’m sure we’ll find a way!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 본부에서 가까운 위치에 <color=#F75D32>엘리스</color>가 있다는 통신이 왔습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: We received a word from HQ that <color=#F75D32>Alice</color> is nearby.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이제 조금만 더 가면 되어요 관측자님!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Just a little more to go, Commander!
Wait... something seems a bit off with her eyes.
Are you okay? Can you hear me?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 어쩔 수 없군요, 관측자님! 엘리스가 세뇌에서 벗어날 수 있게 도와주세요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: What...? Alice, snap out of it! What happened to you?! Commander, please help her break free!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 바로 앞에 <color=#F75D32>용암 지역</color>이 있으니 조심하십쇼 관측자님!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Be careful, Commander! There’s a <color=#F75D32>Lava Zone</color> right ahead of us!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 엘리스! 아무래도 적군에게 세뇌되었던 것 같아요
SpecLanguage.language_en: Alice! It seems you were hypnotized by the enemy.
You’ve come to help me, Atresia!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 고마워 아트레시아, 이제부터는 내가 너희를 도와줄게!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Thank you, Atresia. I owe you so much.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 나는 <color=#F75D32>마법 공격</color>을 할 수 있는 <color=#F75D32>마법사</color> 포지션이어서
SpecLanguage.language_en: I am in the <color=#F75D32>Mage</color> position and can use <color=#F75D32>magic attacks,</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 탱커를 상대로 강력한 <color=#F75D32>마법 피해</color>를 입힐 수 있어!
SpecLanguage.language_en: which means I can deal heavy <color=#F75D32>magic damage</color> to Tanks!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 좋았어 관측자, 이제 싸울 준비가 끝났어!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Great, Commander, now I’m ready to fight!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 바로 다음 스테이지로 가서 나를 배치해줘!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Head to the next stage and deploy me!
Commander! I’m a Mage with the <color=#F75D32>Water Synergy.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 나와 같은 시너지를 지닌 <color=#F75D32>물 저격수 필리아</color>와 함께 배치하면
SpecLanguage.language_en: If you deploy me along with <color=#F75D32>Philia, the Water Ranger,</color> who has the same synergy as me,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: <color=#F75D32>물 시너지</color> 효과로 모든 스텔라 나이츠에게 <color=#F75D32>보호막</color>이 생겨!
SpecLanguage.language_en: the <color=#F75D32>Water Synergy</color> effect will give all the Stella Knights a <color=#F75D32>shield!</color>
Deploy me and check out the <color=#F75D32>Water Synergy effect</color> for yourself!
How about that!? <color=#F75D32>Water Synergy</color> effect is pretty cool in action, right!?
Aside from the Water Synergy, there are other synergies of <color=#F75D32>Fire/Earth/Wind/Light/Darkness.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 전투를 계속하다보면 다양한 시너지를 경험하게 될 거에요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: As you continue to fight, you’ll get to experience various synergies!
Let’s head to the next stage!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 본부에서 저희 스텔라 나이츠를 훈련시키기 위해, <color=#F75D32>증명의 전장</color> 던전을 개방했어요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: The HQ has just opened the <color=#F75D32>Combat Trial</color> dungeon to help the Stella Knights in training!
They say <color=#F75D32>clones of Stella Knights</color> will be appearing as enemies!
Additionally, when you clear a <color=#F75D32>certain stage</color> of Combat Trial,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 전투 편성 인원 수를 <color=#F75D32>1명씩 증가</color>시킬 수 있습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: you can <color=#F75D32>increase by 1</color> the number of units for deployment.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 전투 편성 인원 추가 단계까지 도전해보시죠 관측자님!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Let’s challenge the dungeon up to that very stage, Commander!
Wow, I just fought myself! That was so strange!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저를 닮은 적이 나오면...음 상대하기 어렵겠군요
SpecLanguage.language_en: If I were to fight against an enemy that looks like me... hmm, that would be tough.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아 관측자님, 앞서 말씀드린 것처럼 <color=#F75D32>특정 단계</color>를 클리어하면 <color=#F75D32>전투 배치 인원 수</color>가 증가합니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Oh, Commander, as I mentioned earlier, clearing a <color=#F75D32>certain stage</color> will increase the <color=#F75D32>number of deployment units</color> for the battle.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 지금 현시점에서는 관측자님이 <color=#F75D32>4단계</color>를 클리어하시면 전투 배치인원이 증가하겠군요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: At this point, if you clear <color=#F75D32>Stage 4</color>, you’ll be able to increase the number of deployment units.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: <color=#F75D32>스테이지 클리어 별</color>을 획득하면 증명의 전장 단계가 오픈되니
SpecLanguage.language_en: Battle of Validation stages open upon collecting <color=#F75D32>Stage Clear Stars.</color>
Commander, seems like the enemies are <color=#F75D32>gathering on the right.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이럴 때는 <color=#F75D32>저, 아트레시아를 활용</color>하면 한 번에 여러 적을 타격할 수 있습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: In times like this, if you <color=#F75D32>use me, Atresia</color>, I can strike multiple enemies at once.
Please <color=#F75D32>deploy me</color> in the right position.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저 거대 몬스터는 이곳을 지키는 <color=#F75D32>마그마 골렘</color>으로
SpecLanguage.language_en: That giant monster is the <color=#F75D32>Magma Golem</color> guarding this area.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: <color=#F75D32>십자가 모양 범위</color>에 용암 마그마를 떨어뜨려 적을 스턴시킵니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It drops magma in a <color=#F75D32>cross-shaped area</color> and stuns enemies.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 마그마 골렘의 <color=#F75D32>스킬 범위</color>를 피해 적절한 곳에 스텔라나이츠를 <color=#F75D32>배치</color>해봐요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Try <color=#F75D32>deploying</color> the Stella Knights in positions that avoid the <color=#F75D32>skill range</color> of Magma Golem!
Commander, we’ve just received a message from HQ on <color=#F75D32>reinforcements!</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 강력한 적과 맞설 수 있게, 동료들을 더 모아보죠!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Let’s gather more companions to face stronger enemies!
Wow, the battlefield is packed with Stella Knights!
These new troops will be a great addition. Before heading into serious battle,
let’s get the team ready by <color=#F75D32>leveling them up!</color>
Oh! There’s a light coming from the <color=#F75D32>Combat Trial!</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이 도시 전체를 얼릴 정도면 절대 약하지 않을겁니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: If she can freeze this entire city, she’s definitely not weak.
Hmm... the monsters are gathering on the <color=#F75D32>right!</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 오른쪽에는 얼음들이 있으니 조심해서 배치해야겠다 관측자!
SpecLanguage.language_en: There is some ice to the right, so be cautious when deploying us, Commander!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이제 바로 앞의 몬스터들만 처치하면 이 <color=#F75D32>지역의 지배자</color>를 만나게 됩니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Once we defeat the monsters ahead, we’ll face the <color=#F75D32>ruler of this area.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이 일대를 얼릴 정도면 쉽지 않겠지.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Freezing an entire region like this won’t make them easy to beat.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 모두의 힘을 합치면 분명 이길 수 있을 거에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: But if we all work together, I’m sure we can win.
Commander... I think that's the <color=#F75D32>Stella Knight.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 실력이 형편없어 보여서 여기까지 못오는 건 아닌가 살짝 걱정했어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: You had me worried there with such poor skills.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 으, 안 그래 보이는데 입이 험하잖아!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Ugh, what a sharp tongue she got!
You’ll at least provide me some entertainment, won’t you?
Now, let’s begin the dance of battle!
(Mysterious voice) This is... not the end.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 기절한 것 같습니다, 일단 본부로 후송해야겠어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Seems like she passed out. We should send her back to HQ for treatment.
It must have been the leader of all Apostles, the <color=#F75D32>Witch of Laplace.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 전투 흔적 사이에 라플라스 마녀의 기운은 남아있어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: There’s still a trace of the Witch of Laplace’s aura lingering in the aftermath of the battle.
I’ll send a request to HQ for analysis.
HQ has sent back the analysis results.
The Witch’s aura is pointing towards the <color=#F75D32>[Forgotten Desert].</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 마침 본부에서 현재 미리 파견되어있는 <color=#F75D32>미노</color>님과 합류해서 함께 작전을 수행하라는 미션이 도착했네요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: HQ has just sent a mission to join up with <color=#F75D32>Mino</color>, who was deployed earlier, and carry out the operation together.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 미노님이라면 어린 나이에 본부의 다양한 무기들을 개발한 <color=#F75D32>천재 엔지니어</color>라고 들었어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: I’ve heard that Mino is a <color=#F75D32>Genius Engineer</color> who developed various weapons for HQ at a young age.
This mission won’t be easy either.
Let's head to the <color=#F75D32>[Forgotten Desert]</color> right away!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 관측자님 오데트님과의 전투 후에, 지휘자 스킬 <color=#F75D32>[프리징]</color>을 새롭게 획득했어요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: After the battle with Odette, Commander, you've acquired a new commander skill: <color=#F75D32>[Freezing]!</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 프리징은 일정 범위 내의 적군을 잠시 동안 <color=#F75D32>빙결</color>시키는 효과를 가지고 있어요,
SpecLanguage.language_en: It temporarily <color=#F75D32>freezes</color> enemies in a certain area.
Shall we give it a try?
Ugh... I’m so thirsty! It feels like my throat is burning up!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 조금만 참아요 유니, 여기에 미리 파견된 스텔라나이츠 <color=#F75D32>미노</color>님과 접선하면
SpecLanguage.language_en: Just hold on a bit longer, Yuni. Once we meet the Stella Knight <color=#F75D32>Mino</color>, who was deployed ahead,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아 맞아요, 미노라면 제가 잘 알아요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Oh right, I know Mino quite well.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 과거에 같이 작전을 수행한 적도 있고, 사적으로도 연이 있어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: We’ve worked together on missions before, and we’re also connected on a personal level.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 좀 이상한 녀석이긴 한데...만나면 제가 한 번 이야기를 나눠보겠습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: She’s kind of a weirdo, but I’ll give talking to her a shot when we meet.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 우선 눈 앞의 적들 먼저 정리하죠.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Let’s clear out the enemies in front of us first.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 관측자님, 본부에서 이번 지역의 적들에 대한 <color=#F75D32>세부 정보</color>가 도착했습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Commander, HQ has sent detailed information on the enemies in this area.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 적들은 <color=#F75D32>대지 시너지</color>로, <color=#F75D32>물리 방어력</color>이 일반 몬스터보다 매우 높다고 합니다!
SpecLanguage.language_en: The enemies are using <color=#F75D32>Earth Synergy</color>, and their <color=#F75D32>Phys DEF</color> is much higher than regular monsters!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: <color=#F75D32>물리 관통력</color>이 높은 저와 같은 저격수 포지션을 활용하시거나
SpecLanguage.language_en: Using a Ranger like me, who has high <color=#F75D32>Phys Pen</color>,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: <color=#F75D32>마법 공격</color>을 쓰는 <color=#F75D32>마법사</color> 포지션을 활용하면 적을 쉽게 처치할 수 있을 겁니다!
SpecLanguage.language_en: or a Mage with <color=#F75D32>magic attacks</color> will help you defeat them easily!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저격수, 마법사를 활용해 <color=#F75D32>관측자</color>대지 시너지 몬스터를 공략해보시죠!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Use Rangers and Mages to counter the <color=#F75D32>Earth Synergy</color> monsters, Commander!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그 <color=#F75D32>모래 지역</color>은 이 사막의 샌드웜들이 만들어놓은 함정이에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: That sandy area is a trap set by the sandworms of this desert.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그 지역에 닿으면 몸이 공중으로 떠오르게 되어 <color=#F75D32>일정 시간</color> 동안 전투에 참여가 불가능해져요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: If you step into that area, you’ll be lifted into the air and unable to participate in the battle for a <color=#F75D32>certain amount of time.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 적들에게 쉽게 당할 수 있으니 조심해야 해요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: You’ll be an easy target for enemies, so watch out!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그런데 미노님이 통 연락을 받질 않으시네요... 무슨 일이 있는걸까요?
SpecLanguage.language_en: By the way, Mino hasn't responded at all... Could something be wrong?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 제멋대로인 녀석이라 어디에 박혀서 또 새로운 무기를 만들고 있을거에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: She’s the type to get absorbed in her world, probably she got somewhere making new weapons.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 새로운 무기가 이번에는 안 터지면 좋겠군요...
SpecLanguage.language_en: Hopefully, the new one doesn’t explode this time...
Oh!? Now there’s a different <color=#F75D32>buff platform</color> here!
That buff zone is a <color=#F75D32>DEF Buff</color> zone.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저 지역에 저희 스텔라 나이츠가 위치하면 <color=#F75D32>방어력</color>을 증가시킬 수 있으니
SpecLanguage.language_en: Positioning Stella Knights there will increase their <color=#F75D32>DEF,</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 스텔라 나이츠를 전략적으로 배치해 생존력을 높여보시죠!
SpecLanguage.language_en: so strategically place them to increase their chances of survival!
Mino! What are you up to this time?!
Hati!? What are you doing here?!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 본부에서 미노 당신과 합류해서 라플라스 마녀의 흔적을 찾으라는 미션을 받았어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: We received a mission from HQ to join forces with you, Mino, and search for the Witch of Laplace’s traces.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 흠... 본부에서 갑자기 지원을 보내왔다고? 내가 그렇게 요청을 했을 때는 들은 채도 안 하더니?
SpecLanguage.language_en: Hmm... HQ suddenly sent reinforcements? They ignored me when I asked for help before.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 요즘 들리는 세뇌 사건도 있고, 너희를 믿을 수가 없어!
SpecLanguage.language_en: With all these rumors about brainwashing and getting controlled, I can’t trust anyone!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 하... 자기가 새로 만든 무기를 자랑하고 싶은 모양이에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Ha... Looks like she just wants to show off her new weapon.
Commander, I’ll snap her out of it.
Mino uses <color=#F75D32>Earth Synergy</color>, which gives her high Phys DEF.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 반면, 저는 <color=#F75D32>물리 관통력</color>이 높기 때문에 효과적으로 대미지를 입힐 수 있습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: However, I have a high <color=#F75D32>Phys Pen</color>, so I can deal effective damage to her.
That was fun!? I almost died because of you!
See? I told you, she’s a bit of a weirdo.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 세뇌당한 녀석들은 아니라는 게 판명났으니, 일 얘기를 해보자고.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Now that it's clear none of us are being brainwashed, let's get down to business.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 여기 사막은 잘 모를테니 내가 안내해주지!
SpecLanguage.language_en: You’re not familiar with this desert, so I’ll guide you!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그건 그렇고 미노. 여기는 무슨 일로 왔죠?
SpecLanguage.language_en: By the way, Mino, what brings you here?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 본부에서는 고대의 유물이 요즘 세뇌 사건과 직접적으로 연관이 있다고 보고 있어.
SpecLanguage.language_en: HQ believes the Ancient Relic is directly linked to the recent brainwashing incidents.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그래서 나를 파견해서 고대의 유물을 분석하라고 한거지.
SpecLanguage.language_en: That’s why I was sent to analyze it.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 나 개인적으로도 꽤 흥미있는 대상이기도 하고.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It’s also something I personally find quite interesting.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 어쩌면 사도의 실마리를 잡을 수도 있겠네요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Then, we might even find a clue about the Apostle.
Why are you so confident about that!?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 찾기가 여간 어려워야지! 고대의 유물은 세 개 조각으로 나뉘어져 있어.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It’s not supposed to be so easy to find! The Ancient Relic is divided into three pieces.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 각각의 유물은 이 사막의 몬스터, 샌드웜와 사막 전갈이 수호하고 있어.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Each part is guarded by the desert’s monsters, the sandworms and desert scorpions.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 본부가 너희를 파견한 것도, 내가 혼자 몬스터들을 상대하기 쉽지 않으니
SpecLanguage.language_en: HQ sent you guys because it's not easy for me to handle all the monsters alone,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 팀을 이뤄서 고대의 유물을 회수하라고 한거고.
SpecLanguage.language_en: so they ordered to form a team and recover the relic.
Ugh, <color=#F75D32>sandworms!</color> I really don’t want to deal with them!
... It seems there’s a sandworm nearby.
The number of creatures around us has suddenly dropped.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 듣기론 샌드웜이 주변의 생물체의 생기를 흡수한다고 하더라구요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: I’ve heard sandworms drain the life force of nearby creatures.
You’ll be caught off guard if you’ve never faced one before.
I’ll lead the battle, follow me!
It’s my first time seeing one in person too.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 샌드웜은 기본적으로 가까이에 있는 적을 물어뜯어 공격해.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Sandworms mainly attack by biting enemies nearby.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그리고 스킬을 쓸 때 바닥으로 들어가는데, 이 때는 <color=#F75D32>공격 대상</color>이 되지 않아.
SpecLanguage.language_en: When they use their skill, they burrow underground, and during that time, they can’t be <color=#F75D32>targeted.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그리고 가장 공격력이 높은 적 바닥에서부터 <color=#F75D32>가시</color>를 솟구치게 해 공격을 하지.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Then they emerge from beneath and strike the enemy with the highest ATK with <color=#F75D32>spikes.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 지금 우리 중에 <color=#F75D32>가장 공격력이 높은</color> 스텔라나이츠는 각별히 조심해야 할거야.
SpecLanguage.language_en: The Stella Knight with the <color=#F75D32>highest ATK</color> among us needs to be extra careful.
Alright, let’s begin the sandworm hunt!
Is that the piece of a relic?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그래, 이게 내가 그 동안 찾아 헤맸던 고대 유물의 첫 번째 조각이야.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Yes, this is the first piece of the ancient relic that I’ve been searching for.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이제 앞으로 두 개 조각만 더 찾으면 돼!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Now, we just need to find two more!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 으~ 고대 유물이고 나발이고 그냥 본부로 돌아갈래!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Ugh, relics or whatever, I just want to go back to HQ!
Oh, what’s that chest over there?!
that you can <color=#F75D32>destroy</color> by dealing damage to it.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 방해물을 파괴해 새로운 경로를 만들 수도 있으니 참고해주시기 바랍니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Destroying obstacles can open new paths, so keep that in mind.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 미노! 그런데 너는 왜 그렇게 열심히 고대 유적을 찾는거야?
SpecLanguage.language_en: Mino! But why are you so obsessed with finding the ancient relic?
Obviously, to create an incredible weapon!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아무도 만들지 못하는 뛰어난 무기를 만들게 되면
SpecLanguage.language_en: If I can make a weapon that no one else can,
no one will ever look down on me again!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그 최고의 무기가 이번에는 잘 작동하겠죠?
SpecLanguage.language_en: Let’s hope this ‘ultimate weapon’ of yours actually works this time.
Of course, it will, who do you think made it?!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 예전에 전장 한 복판에서 당신이 만든 총이 발사가 되지 않아서 죽을뻔한 적은 기억하죠?
SpecLanguage.language_en: Remember that time in the middle of a battlefield when the gun you made didn’t fire and I almost died?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 사소해, 사소해. 그런 일은 나같은 천재에게는 사소한 일이야!
SpecLanguage.language_en: That was a minor detail, totally insignificant. Small things like that are trivial to a genius like me!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: ... 고대 유물을 찾는 게 맞는 건가 싶습니다 관측자님.
SpecLanguage.language_en: ...I’m starting to question whether looking for the ancient relic is really the right thing, Commander.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 두 번째 수호자 몬스터가 나타난 것 같군요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It looks like the second guardian monster has appeared.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저 전갈은 <color=#F75D32>강력한 독침</color>을 발사해, 치유 능력을 억제시켜!
SpecLanguage.language_en: That scorpion shoots a <color=#F75D32>deadly venomous sting</color> that suppresses healing abilities!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 또 독침은 근처에 있는 적을 추적해 추가 대미지를 주니 조심하라고!
SpecLanguage.language_en: The sting also tracks nearby enemies and deals additional damage, so be careful!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 좋아, 이걸로 두 번째 조각 획득이야.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Alright, that’s the second piece secured.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 지금 본부에서 <color=#F75D32>증명의 전장</color>의 새로운 단계가 오픈되었다고 연락이 왔어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: We just got word from HQ that a new stage in the <color=#F75D32>Battle of Validation</color> has opened.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저희의 부대 편성 인원을 <color=#F75D32>7명</color>까지 늘릴 수 있는 기회에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: This is a chance to expand our unit deployment up to <color=#F75D32>7 units.</color>
Let’s challenge the dungeon right away!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 축하드려요 관측자님, 이제 7명까지 저희 스텔라 나이츠들을 배치할 수 있어요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Congratulations, Commander! Now you can deploy up to 7 of our Stella Knights!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 관측자님 마침 본부에서 동료 파견 지원 요청이 왔습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Also, HQ has just sent a request for reinforcements.
Head to the main screen and proceed with a <color=#F75D32>10x summon!</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 본격적인 전투 전에 부대를 한 번 정비해볼까요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Shall we organize the squad one more time before the big battle?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이제 고대 유물 한 조각만 더 찾으면 내가 바라는 최고의 무기를 만들 수 있어!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Once we find the last relic piece, I can finally create the ultimate weapon I’ve been dreaming of!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 미노, 예전부터 궁금했는데 최고가 되는 게 그렇게 중요해요?
SpecLanguage.language_en: Mino, I’ve always wondered, why is becoming the best so important to you.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 당연히 중요하지! 나의 천재다움을 온 세상이 알아야하지 않겠어?
SpecLanguage.language_en: Of course, it is! Shouldn't the whole world know that I'm a genius?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이미 본부 지오프론트에서는 당신이 만든 무기를 제법 많이 사용되고 있어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: They’re already using plenty of your weapons in the HQ Geofront.
Most people agree that the quality is pretty good, too.
What’s this? A compliment from you?!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그냥요. 당신은 지금 그대로도 충분하다는 이야기를 하고 싶었어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Just saying... I think you're already doing great just the way you are.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 무슨 낯간지러운 소리야! 더위를 먹었나, 으흠!
SpecLanguage.language_en: What's with the cheesy talk? What's gotten into you? Ahem!
Anyway, let’s go hunt some monsters!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 전투가 지치신다면 저희 저격수들을 적극적으로 활용해주시길 바랍니다, 관측자님.
SpecLanguage.language_en: If the battle’s wearing you out, make sure to make full use of our Rangers, Commander.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저를 비롯한 <color=#F75D32>저격수 포지션</color>은 높은 관통력으로 이 지역의 몬스터를 수월하게 상대할 수 있습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: The knights in <color=#F75D32>Ranger position</color>, including myself, can easily take out monsters in this area with high penetration.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 추가로 특정 스텔라나이츠의 경우에도 <color=#F75D32>관통력</color>이 높기 때문에
SpecLanguage.language_en: Additionally, certain Stella Knights also have high <color=#F75D32>penetration</color>,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 스텔라 나이츠의 <color=#F75D32>스탯 특성</color>을 잘 확인해보시면 도움이 되실겁니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: so make sure to check the <color=#F75D32>stats</color> of the units for the best results.
Let’s go take down that sandworm!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이걸로 마지막 고대 유물 조각까지 모두 획득했어!
SpecLanguage.language_en: With this, we’ve gathered all the ancient relic pieces!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이걸 본부로 돌아가서 조립만 하면 끝이야.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Now, we just need to return to HQ and assemble them.
The real challenge is figuring out how to get out of here.
But everyone, be cautious from now on.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 사실 나 말고도 여기에 머물고 있는 스텔라나이츠가 1명 더있어.
SpecLanguage.language_en: There’s actually one more Stella Knight staying here besides me.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 안타깝게도 그 녀석은 세뇌에 걸린 것 같고.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Unfortunately, it seems that person has been brainwashed.
Tetora... I've never heard of this name before.
You don’t know Tetora, who was recently ranked <color=#F75D32>Number 1 in the Arena</color> among the Stella Knights?!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 사실 테토라도 고대 유적을 차지하려는 목적으로 사막에 온 모양이야.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Apparently, Tetora came to the desert with the intent of claiming the Ancient Relic.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 안타깝게도 그 과정에서 적에게 세뇌된 것 같고.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Sadly, it looks like she was brainwashed during that process.
We need to rescue her, too!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 안타깝지만 그렇게 쉽지 않을걸. 괜히 아레나 1등이 아니었으니깐 말야.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Unfortunately, it won’t be that easy. She didn’t become Arena’s top rank for nothing.
Is there any way to save her?
Well, I guess now is the time to think it over.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이 몸을 위해 기꺼이 고대의 유물을 모아오다니,
SpecLanguage.language_en: You’ve gone through all this trouble gathering the Ancient Relic for me.
You’ve worked so hard, now hand it over!
How can she be so shameless?!
She is a Guardian with an Earth Synergy.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 가디언이어서 물리 방어력은 낮은 대신에 <color=#F75D32>마법 방어력</color>이 높아.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Being a Guardian, her Phys DEF is low, but her <color=#F75D32>Magic DEF</color> is high.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이왕이면 지금 부대에서 <color=#F75D32>필리아, 하티 그리고 나</color>와 같은 <color=#F75D32>저격수</color>들이 테토라를 상대하기 좋을거야.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It would be best if <color=#F75D32>Rangers</color> like <color=#F75D32>Philia, Hati, and I</color> take on Tetora.
That's all for the explanation. Now let's face her head-on!
...I told you, she’s Arena's number one for a reason.
What am I doing in the desert?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 너는 고대 유물을 찾는 과정에서 적한테 세뇌되었어, 그걸 우리가 지금 깨워준거고.
SpecLanguage.language_en: You were brainwashed by the enemy during your search for that Ancient Relic, but don’t worry, you’re all right now.
Haha! Looks like I owe you one, huh?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 다음에 아레나로 한 번 놀러와! 내가 특별히 직접 상대해주지!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Next time, come visit the Arena! I'll personally take you on!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 또 싸우자는 거잖아! 세뇌된 상태로 둘 걸 그랬어!
SpecLanguage.language_en: So you're saying you want to fight again? I should’ve just left you brainwashed!
Commander! We've received a message from HQ!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 야수의 숲으로 이동해달라는 요청입니다, 그런데... 내부 사정이 복잡하군요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: There's a request to move to the Forest of Beasts, but... things seem complicated internally.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 먼저 <color=#F75D32>[야수의 숲]</color>으로 이동하시면 제가 세부적인 상황을 설명드리겠습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Let’s move to the <<color=#F75D32>[Forest of Beasts]</color> first, I'll explain the details further.
Let's head to the <<color=#F75D32>[Forest of Beasts]</color>, Commander!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 관측자님, 사막 지역을 클리어하면서 새로운 지휘자 스킬 <color=#F75D32>[에어본]</color>을 습득하셨어요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Commander, by clearing the desert region, you've acquired a new commander skill: <color=#F75D32>[Airborne]</color>!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 에어본 스킬은 지정한 적 1명을 일정 시간 동안 공중에 띄우는 스킬이에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: The Airborne skill allows you to lift a designated enemy into the air for a certain period.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 강력한 적을 견제할 수 있는 좋은 스킬이니 잊지말고 활용해주세요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: It's a great skill for controlling powerful enemies, so make sure to use it!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 왜 이렇게 여기 지역 몬스터들은 <color=#F75D32>공격 속도</color>가 빠른 것 같지!?
SpecLanguage.language_en: Why do the monsters in this area seem to have such a fast <color=#F75D32>ATK SPD?!</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그건 여기 몬스터들이 <color=#F75D32>바람 시너지</color> 몬스터이기 때문입니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: That’s because the monsters here have <color=#F75D32>Wind Synergy.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 바람 시너지는 같은 시너지의 몬스터가 많이 배치될수록 <color=#F75D32>공격 속도</color>가 늘어납니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: The more monsters with Wind Synergy are placed together, the faster their <color=#F75D32>ATK SPD</color> becomes.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 공격 속도를 감소 시키는 스텔라나이츠를 활용하거나
SpecLanguage.language_en: Use Stella Knights to decrease their ATK SPD
or increase the <color=#F75D32>DEF</color> to prepare for the enemies' attacks, Commander.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 필리아! 그런데 이번에는 왜 우리가 정글로 오게 된거야!?
SpecLanguage.language_en: Philia! But why did we come to the jungle this time?!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아, 제가 설명 드리는 걸 깜빡했군요.
현재 이 야수의 숲에는, 본부와 대치중인 <color=#F75D32>반란 세력</color>의 본부가 위치해있다고 합니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It appears that the HQ of the <color=#F75D32>Rebel Forces</color>, who are in conflict with our HQ, is located in this region.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 결국 본부도 다양한 신념을 가진 이들이 모인 곳이니, 이런 대립은 어쩔 수 없죠.
SpecLanguage.language_en: In the end, the HQ is made up of people with diverse beliefs, so conflicts like this are inevitable.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이번 기회에 본부에서는 <color=#F75D32>반란 세력</color> 의 중심 인물을 찾아내고자 한답니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: The HQ is hoping to take this opportunity to identify key figures of the <color=#F75D32>Rebel Forces.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 먼저 파견된 본부 감사팀 팀원인 메이님이 이 지역에 있다고 하니,
SpecLanguage.language_en: May, from the HQ’s audit team, was sent ahead and should be somewhere around here.
Let’s meet with her and check the current situation.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 으잇! 아니 이 거는 또 뭐야!

SpecLanguage.language_en: It’s a hunting trap for beasts.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 듣기로는, 이 지역에는 곳곳에 이런 덫들이 많이 배치되어있다고 합니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: I've heard that there are many traps like this scattered throughout the area.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 밟게 되면 대미지를 받고 일정 시간 동안 움직일 수 없게 되니 조심하세요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: If you step on one, you’ll take damage and be unable to move for a while, so watch your step.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 어! 저기에 또 새로운 발판이 나왔어!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Oh! There's another new platform over there!
Am I really that much of an explainer? Hmm.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저 발판은 주문력 발판으로, <color=#F75D32>마법사 포지션</color> 스텔라 나이츠의 대미지를 확실하게 증가시켜줍니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: That platform is a magic power platform, which significantly increases the damage of Stella Knights in the <color=#F75D32>Mage position.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 기존 발판과 동일하게 발판 위에 있을 때만 효과가 적용되니 이 점 꼭 참고 바랍니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Just like with the other platforms, the effect only applies while you're standing on it, so keep that in mind.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이제 곧 있으면 메이님과 합류할 지점에 도착합니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: We’re almost at the rendezvous point where we should meet up with May.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그런데 메이님은 본부 내의 생활 관리 조직 <color=#F75D32>MAID 소속</color>아니셨나요?
SpecLanguage.language_en: By the way, wasn’t May part of HQ’s internal lifestyle management organization, <color=#F75D32>MAID?</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 맞아! 요리는 엄~청 못해도 열심히는 하는 것 같던데!?
SpecLanguage.language_en: That’s right! Even though she’s a terrible cook, she sure tries her best!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 맞습니다, 그런데 MAID 조직이 겉으로는 본부 생활 관리를 전담하는 팀이지만
SpecLanguage.language_en: Yes, but while the MAID team officially handles lifestyle management,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 내부 조직 부정부패 감사를 하는 게 주목적인 팀입니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: its main role is auditing internal corruption within the organization.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저흰 본부에서 메이님을 돕기위해 파견온 플레이아데스 부대입니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: We’re the Pleiades unit, dispatched by HQ to assist you, May.
Pleiades... that's the unit where Philia is a part of.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그런데 이 임무는 비밀 임무라 본부에서 섣불리 다른 부대를 파견보내지는 않을텐데...
SpecLanguage.language_en: Hm. But this mission is supposed to be a covert one, so HQ wouldn’t send a unit so easily...
I can't trust you just yet!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아이! 요즘 세뇌 사건 때문에 다들 엄청 예민해져있잖아!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Ah, everyone’s so on edge lately with all these brainwashing incidents!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 우선 어쩔 수 없습니다, 전투를 진행하시죠 관측자님!
SpecLanguage.language_en: We have no choice for now. Let's proceed with the battle, Commander!
Philia! So it really was you.
It’s been a while, May. Almost half a year, right?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 제가 파견온 게 거의 그정도 되니깐요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Yes, it's been about that long since I was dispatched.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 비밀 조직 기지 위치는 파악을 완료했습니다, 기지를 급습할 전투 인원이 모자랐던 참인데
SpecLanguage.language_en: I have pinpointed the location of the secret organization’s base, but I’ve been short on combat personnel to raid it.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아트레시아님을 비롯해 이렇게 여러 분들이 모여주셨으니
SpecLanguage.language_en: Now that you’re all here, including Atresia,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이제 본격적으로 작전을 개시할 수 있을 것 같아요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: we can finally begin the operation.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 일단 더 자세한 사항은 움직이면서 얘기하시죠!
SpecLanguage.language_en: We’ll discuss the details as we move!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 혹시 비밀 조직에 어떤 인물이 있는지도 파악이 되었나요?
SpecLanguage.language_en: Have you identified any key figures within the secret organization?
... Yes, but now I... I’m not so sure.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 정황들은 한 방향을 향하고 있지만, 저는 믿고 싶지 않아요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Everything points in one direction, but I just can’t bring myself to believe it.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 흠... 보고 싶은 것만 본다는 거구만!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Oh, right... maybe you’re just seeing what you want to see!
It must be someone you really trusted.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 어! 뭔가 쿵쿵 하는 소리가 들리는 것 같은데!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Oh! I think I hear something stomping around!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이 지역의 거대 몬스터인 것 같습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It sounds like one of the giant monsters in this area.
May, what kind of monster is it?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아! 미안해요, 잠시 저도 모르게 생각을...
SpecLanguage.language_en: Oh! Sorry, I got lost in thought for a moment...

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 힘들겠지만, 우선 눈 앞에 적을 같이 쓰러뜨리는 것에 집중해요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: I know it’s tough, but for now, let’s focus on taking down the enemy in front of us!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 눈 앞의 적은, <color=#F75D32>탱커형</color> 거대 몬스터로 스킬을 사용하면
SpecLanguage.language_en: The enemy ahead is a <color=#F75D32>Tank-type</color> giant monster.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 공중에 뛰어오른 후 바닥해 착지해 <color=#F75D32>대미지와 스턴</color>을 효과를 부여하는 몬스터입니다!
SpecLanguage.language_en: When it uses its skill, it leaps into the air and then lands, dealing <color=#F75D32>damage and stunning</color> anyone nearby!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 현재 체력 비율이 가장 낮은 적에게 스킬을 사용하니
SpecLanguage.language_en: It targets the enemy with the lowest current HP,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저희 중 현재 체력 비율이 낮은 아군을 잘 보호해야 합니다!
SpecLanguage.language_en: so we need to make sure to protect any allies with low HP right now!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 휴! 꼭 성난 고릴라 같은 몬스터였어!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Whew! That monster was like an enraged gorilla!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 마침 본부에서 동료 파견 연락이 도착했습니다!
SpecLanguage.language_en: We’ve received a message from HQ on reinforcements!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 메인 화면에 가서 소환을 진행하시죠 관측자님!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Let’s head to the main screen and summon them, Commander!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이 지역은 우리 생각보다 전투가 험난할 것 같아요, 관측자님.
SpecLanguage.language_en: This area seems to be more dangerous than we thought, Commander.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 본격적인 전투 전에 레벨 업을 먼저 해두는 건 어떨까요?
SpecLanguage.language_en: How about leveling up before the real battle begins?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아까부터 무슨 생각을 그렇게 하고 있는 겁니까 메이.
SpecLanguage.language_en: What have you been thinking about all this time, May?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 메이님이 불편하다면 이야기하지 않아도 괜찮아요, 하지만
SpecLanguage.language_en: If you're uncomfortable, you don’t have to talk about it,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 분명 그 대상을 마주해야하는 날이 올거에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: but the day will come when you'll have to face that person.
...That’s right. In the end, I have to face her..

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 결국, 여러분들도 저와 함께 임무를 수행해야 하니 말씀드리겠습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Alright, since you’re all on this mission with me, I’ll tell you.
The person currently suspected of being part of the rebel forces is...
It’s the current leader of MAID, <color=#F75D32>April.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 에이프릴님이라면 MAID 조직 창립 멤버 아닌가요?
SpecLanguage.language_en: April? Isn’t she one of the founding members of the MAID organization?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 최상층부에서는 이전에서부터 각 조직의 창립 멤버들을 줄곧 관찰해 왔었습니다,
SpecLanguage.language_en: The top executives have been closely monitoring the founding members of each organization for a long time,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 누구보다 올곧은 이들이, 가장 부러지기 쉽다라는 이유로 말이죠.
SpecLanguage.language_en: believing that those who stand the firmest are the most likely to break.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 하지만 그 이유만으로는 상층부의 세력 지키기로 밖에는 안 보이는데요?
SpecLanguage.language_en: But to me, that just seems like the top trying to maintain their power.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 하지만 상층부의 의심을 확신으로 바뀌는 사건이 최근에 일어나고 말았어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: A recent incident turned their suspicions into certainty.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 처음에는 단순한 사고사로 여겼지만, 여러 정황과 증거를 조사한 결과
SpecLanguage.language_en: At first, it was thought to be an accident, but after investigating the circumstances and evidence,
it became clear that it was a planned incident.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그것만 가지고는 에이프릴님을 확정할 수 없지 않나요?
SpecLanguage.language_en: But that alone isn’t enough to accuse April, is it?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 맞아요,하지만 암살당한 인물이 스텔라나이츠에 대한 강성 정책을 폈다라고 하며 이야기가 달라져요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: That's right, but the story changes when you consider that the person who was assassinated had been pushing for a hardline policy against the Stella Knights.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 강성 정책이라면 저희를... 단지 쓰고 버리는 전쟁 무기로서 다량 생산하자라는 그 정책 말하는 거군요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: You mean the policy to mass-produce us as disposable weapons of war.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그리고 그 정책으로 많은 스텔라 나이츠들과 관련자들이 희생되었죠.
SpecLanguage.language_en: And because of that policy, many Stella Knights and their affiliates lost their lives.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 결정적으로 그 희생자들 중에서는 에이프릴님의 가족도 있었구요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Crucially, among the victims were April’s own family.
Wait, is it another brainwashed Stella Knight? Snap out of it, you fool!
I have no grudge against you.
I’m just hired for the job.
Whew... we finally took her down!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 엣흠, 그러니까 지금까지 메이의 얘기를 종합하면
SpecLanguage.language_en: Ahem, so if we summarize what May has told us so far,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 1. 스텔라 나이츠를 무기처럼 험하게 다루는 핵심 간부가 죽었는데
SpecLanguage.language_en: 1. A key executive who treated the Stella Knights like disposable weapons was killed.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 2. 그 간부가 예전에 에이프릴의 가족을 희생시켰고
SpecLanguage.language_en: 2. That executive was responsible for the death of April’s family in the past.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 3. 그것에 원한을 품은 에이프릴이 반란 세력을 만들었을 것이다! 이말이지?
SpecLanguage.language_en: 3. And out of a grudge, April likely formed the rebel forces! Is that right?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 정확합니다, 그것 외에도 정황증거들이 다량으로 확인되었어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: That’s correct. There’s also a lot of circumstantial evidence to support this.
At this point, it’s almost certain.
May. What do you want to do now?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 필리아 너무 그렇게 메이님을 몰아붙이지 마세요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Philia, don’t push May too hard like that.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 흠... 그렇다면 제 과거 얘기를 해드리죠.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Hmm... Then let me tell you about my past.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아트레시아, 유니와 함께 하기 전 저는 다른 전장에 파견되었습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Before joining Atresia and Yuni, I was deployed to another battlefield.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그 때 믿고 따르던 리더가 알고보니 저희팀 무기를 몰래 팔아치우고 있었죠.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Back then, the leader I trusted was secretly selling off our team’s weapons.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그 무기만 제대로 있었어도 많은 동료들이 다치지 않았을 겁니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: If we had those weapons, many of my companions wouldn’t have been hurt.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 리더에게 왜 그런 짓을 벌인 거냐고 묻고 싶었지만 저는 하지 못했어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: I wanted to ask the leader why, but I just couldn’t do it.
It must have been really hard for you...

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 함께 했던 추억들이 거짓말이 되어버릴 것 같았거든요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It felt like all the memories we shared would become lies.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 하지만 지금은 후회합니다, 차라리 진실을 마주할걸.
SpecLanguage.language_en: But now I regret it. I wish I had faced the truth.
If I had, I would have found the strength to move forward.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 아니에요! 에이프릴님은 분명 이유가 있었을 거에요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: No! April must have had her reasons!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 에이프릴님은 우리 모두를 위해 궂은 일도 마지 않았던 분이에요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: April was the kind of person who never backed down from doing the tough jobs for all of us!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그런 분이 이런...이런 일을 했을리가 없어요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Someone like her could never... could never have done something like this!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: ... 당신들은 이제 본부로 돌아가도 될 것 같아요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: ... You can all return to HQ now.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이런 목적으로 당신들을 부른 게 아니었어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: This isn’t why I brought you here.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이제 여기서부터는 저 혼자 모든 것을 처리할게요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: From here on, I’ll handle everything on my own.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저는...저는 에이프릴님의 소중한 부하니깐 할 수 있을거에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: No need to worry... I’ll handle it.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 지금은 적진 한복판이에요, 게다가 저기 근방에 거대 몬스터의 기운도 느껴진다구요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: We’re right in the middle of enemy territory, and I can sense a giant monster nearby!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: ...혼란스러운 건 잘 알겠지만, 일단 거대 몬스터부터 잡고 우리 생각해봐요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: ...  I know you're confused, but let’s take down the giant monster first, then we can think this through.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그래도 우리는 동료 잖아요. 혼자서는 아무것도 할 수 없어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: We’re still companions, after all. You can’t do this alone.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: (아트레시아와 함께 돌아오는 메이를 보며) 어! 메이다!
SpecLanguage.language_en: (Seeing May return with Atresia) Oh! May’s back!
... Have you calmed down a bit?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 당신은 많이 지쳤어요. 우선 주변 몬스터들을 정리하고 같이 잠시 생각해봐요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: You’re exhausted. Let’s clear out the nearby monsters first and take a moment to think together.
Ugh, I can’t stand this gloomy mood!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 다들 언제까지 입 꾹 닫고 있을거야! 이 답답이들!!
SpecLanguage.language_en: How long are you all going to sit there in silence? Come on, you fools!!
We've received a message from HQ, but... this is...

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 에이프릴님이... 직접 발표를 한 영상 같네요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It looks like a video of April... making an announcement herself.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 공식적으로 자신이 벌여왔던 일과 조직의 존재를 인정한 것 같습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: It seems she’s officially acknowledging what she’s been doing and the existence of the organization.
It feels like she’s taking all the blame upon herself...
Drawing all the arrows toward her?
I need to confirm this myself.
Have you made up your mind?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 예전에 제가 처음 MAID에 들어왔을 때 홍차 하나도 제대로 못 우리던 저에게
SpecLanguage.language_en: When I first joined MAID, I couldn’t even brew a proper cup of tea,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 에이프릴님은, 포기하지 않고 시도하는 게 중요한 거라고 하셨죠.
SpecLanguage.language_en: but April told me that what matters is to keep trying, to never give up.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그 시도하는 마음이 세상을 조금씩 좋게 만들거라구요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: She said that this spirit of trying would slowly make the world a better place.
What are you talking about all of a sudden!?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 지금 제가 상황을 바꾸진 못하겠지만 최소한 직접 물어보고 싶어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: I may not be able to change the situation right now, but at the very least, I want to ask her directly.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 왜 이런 일을 꾸민건지, 도대체 무슨 목적이었는지 말이에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Why she planned all of this, what her true goal was.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 에이프릴님! 도대체 무슨 일을 벌이고 있는 겁니까!
SpecLanguage.language_en: April! What on earth are you doing?!
So, you've finally made it here, May.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 모든 것을 되돌릴 수도 있었어요! 어째서...
SpecLanguage.language_en: We could have fixed everything! Why...

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 제 시간은 제 가족과 동료들이 꺾여나갔을때 이미 같이 멈춰버렸답니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: My time stopped when my family and friends were taken from me.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 오세요 메이. 제가 알려준 것들이 헛되지 않았다는 것을 직접 보여주세요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: Come, May. Show them that what I taught you wasn’t in vain!
These monsters... might be part of <color=#F75D32>someone’s</color> plan...

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 자~ 모두들 고생 많았어요, (혼잣말로 작게) 이런 냄새나는 곳에 제가 안 오게 했으면 더 좋았겠지만요
SpecLanguage.language_en: Alright, everyone, great work. (Muttering quietly to herself) It would have been better if they hadn’t made me come to such a filthy place...

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 하급 스텔라 나이츠들은 잠자코 <color=#F75D32>헤카테님</color> 명령만 따르면 될텐데 왜 이런 고생을 하는 걸까요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Why are those lower-ranked Stella Knights going through all this trouble when they should just follow <color=#F75D32>Lady Hecate's</color> orders quietly?

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 그들의 생각은 저희가 알 필요도 없죠. 자, 여기서부터는 <color=#F75D32>우리 중앙 본부</color>에서 정리하겠습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Why should we care? <color=#F75D32>Central HQ</color> will handle everything from here.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 어! 저기 저 사람들 에이프릴의 몸을 회수해가고 있어...! 옷에 써있는 저 글씨는...
SpecLanguage.language_en: Look! Those people are taking away April’s body...! The writing on their clothes says...

SpecLanguage.language_kr: !! 과거에 제 리더가 무기를 팔아넘겼던 바로 그 조직입니다...!
SpecLanguage.language_en: That’s the same organization my former leader sold weapons to...!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 무언가 잘못 되고 있어요... 이대로 있으면 안돼요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Something is seriously wrong... We can’t just sit here and do nothing.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 이대로 에이프릴님의 몸을 빼앗길 수는 없어요, 저는 본부로 향하겠어요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: I can’t let them take April’s body. I’m heading to HQ.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 내부의 적이라는 에이프릴님의 말에 분명 의미가 있을 거에요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: There’s definitely a meaning behind April’s words about the enemy within.
Will you join us too, Commander?
Thank you, Commander. From now on,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저희 스텔라나이츠를 충분히 레벨 업 시키면
적을 가볍게 처치할 수 있을 거에요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: we’ll be able to easily defeat the enemies!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 제가 <color=#F75D32>스텔라 나이츠 관리창</color>으로 보내드릴게요, 스텔라 나이츠를 <color=#F75D32>레벨 업</color> 시켜주세요!
SpecLanguage.language_en: I’ll take you to the <color=#F75D32>Stella Knights Management.</color> Please level up the <color=#F75D32>Stella Knights!</color>
Level us up using rewards from the <color=#F75D32>Quests</color> or <color=#F75D32>Idle Bonus,</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 관측자! 이전 <color=#F75D32>스테이지</color>를 다시 플레이하면 클리어 보상은 물론
SpecLanguage.language_en: Commander! Did you know that by replaying previous <color=#F75D32>stages,</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 획득한 <color=#F75D32>별 누적 갯수</color>에 따라 <color=#F75D32>소환권</color>도 얻을 수 있다는 사실, 알고 있었어!?
SpecLanguage.language_en: not only can you earn rewards for clearing, but you can also get <color=#F75D32>summon tickets</color> based on the <color=#F75D32>total number of stars</color> you’ve collected?!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: <color=#F75D32>별 누적 갯수</color>는 메인 화면 왼쪽 아래 <color=#F75D32>지구본 모양</color> 아이콘을 클릭하면 확인할 수 있어!
SpecLanguage.language_en: You can check the <color=#F75D32>total number of stars</color> by clicking the <color=#F75D32>globe icon</color> in the bottom left of the main screen!
Now, let’s go replay those previous <color=#F75D32>stages!</color>
Where on earth did it come from?!

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 왔나 제군들. 이곳은 스텔라 나이츠의 <color=#F75D32>잠재된 힘</color>을 끌어내기 위한 증명의 전장이다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Welcome, everyone. This is the Combat Trial designed to draw out the <color=#F75D32>latent power</color> of the Stella Knights.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 나와의 전투에서 승리하게 되면, 전투 시 배치할 수 있는 인원이 <color=#F75D32>추가로 1명</color> 증가하지.
SpecLanguage.language_en: If you defeat me in battle, you’ll be able to deploy <color=#F75D32>1 additional unit</color> in future fights.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 조심하십쇼, 관측자님. 제클린 장군이 타고 있는 <color=#F75D32>네오 타이탄</color>은
SpecLanguage.language_en: Be careful, Commander. General Jacqueline’s <color=#F75D32>Neo Titan</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 일정 시간마다 <color=#F75D32>특정 위치</color>에 대미지를 주는 레이저 포를 발사합니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: fires a laser cannon that deals damage to <color=#F75D32>specific locations</color> at set intervals.
There’s a <color=#F75D32>pattern</color> to where the cannon fires,

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 발사 위치를 잘 관찰하시면 <color=#F75D32>유리한 위치</color>를 찾을 수 있을겁니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: so if you observe carefully, you can find a <color=#F75D32>safe spot.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 관측자님, 이곳은 <color=#F75D32>아레나 방어 덱</color>을 셋팅할 수 있는 곳입니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Commander, this is where you can set up your <color=#F75D32>Arena Defense Deck.</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 저희 스텔라 나이츠뿐만 아니라 <color=#F75D32>방해물을 배치</color>해 전략을 짤 수 있습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en: In addition to deploying Stella Knights, you can also <color=#F75D32>place obstacles</color> to craft your strategy.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 방해물은 특히 상대의 <color=#F75D32>동선을 유도</color>할 수 있으니 꼭 활용해주세요.
SpecLanguage.language_en: Obstacles are particularly useful for <color=#F75D32>directing the enemy’s movement,</color> so be sure to take advantage of them.

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 추가로 방어 덱은 관측자님이 <color=#F75D32>오프라인 상태</color>일 때도 전투가 이뤄지며
SpecLanguage.language_en: Also, your defense deck will be active even when you’re <color=#F75D32>offline,</color>

SpecLanguage.language_kr: 전투 전적을 통해 방어 덱에 승리한 적에게 <color=#F75D32>복수</color>도 할 수 있으니 참고바랍니다!
SpecLanguage.language_en: and through battle records, you can even seek <color=#F75D32>revenge</color> on those who defeated your defense deck!
Mission 52. The One Who Arrived First
Achieve Alice’s growth up to Lv. 3

엘리스를 배치한 후

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
각 챕터마다 <color=#0055FF>고유의 기믹</color>이 존재합니다.
불 지역은 위에 캐릭터가 위치하면 
초당 <color=#0055FF>일정 대미지</color>를 입힙니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Each chapter has its unique gimmick.
In Chapter 2, the Lava Zone <color=#0055FF>deals a certain amount of damage per second</color> when a character is positioned on it.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
방해물은 캐릭터와 몬스터의 <color=#0055FF>이동을 막습니다. </color>
해당 타일에는 캐릭터를 배치할 수 없습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Obstacles <color=#0055FF>restrict</color> the movement of both characters and monsters,
and characters cannot be placed on those tiles.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
동일한 속성 시너지의 캐릭터를 <color=#0055FF>2명 이상</color> 배치하면, 
<color=#0055FF>시너지 효과</color>가 활성화됩니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
When two or more characters with the <color=#0055FF>same element synergy</color> are placed, 
the synergy effect is activated.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
증명의 전장은 <color=#0055FF>성장의 결정</color>을 획득할 수 있는 던전입니다. 
특정 단계 클리어 시 <color=#0055FF>배치 인원 수</color>가 증가합니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
The Combat Trial is a dungeon where you can obtain <color=#0055FF>Growth Crystals.</color>
Clearing certain stages <color=#0055FF>increases</color> the number of units you can deploy.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
일부 스킬은 발동 시 <color=#0055FF>범위</color>가 표시됩니다.
스킬 범위를 확인 후 전략적으로 캐릭터를 <color=#0055FF>배치</color>해보세요.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Some skills of characters and monsters display their <color=#0055FF>range</color> on the tiles when activated.
Check the skill range and <color=#0055FF>strategically place</color> your characters.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
지휘자 스킬을 활용해 <color=#0055FF>전투</color>를 지원할 수 있습니다. 
<color=#0055FF>챕터</color>를 클리어하면 추가 지휘자 스킬을 획득할 수 있습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
You can <color=#0055FF>support battles</color> using Commander Skills.
Clearing <color=#0055FF>chapters</color> will unlock additional Commander Skills.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
암살자 포지션은 전투 시작 시 <color=#0055FF>적진으로</color> 즉시 이동합니다.
암살자를 활용해 <color=#0055FF>적 후방</color>을 공략해보세요.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Assassins move immediately to the <color=#0055FF>enemy's rear</color> at the start of battle.
Use them to target the enemy backline.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
<color=#0055FF>증명의 전장 특정 단계</color>를 클리어하면
전투 인원 <color=#0055FF>1명을 추가로</color> 배치할 수 있습니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
If you clear a <color=#0055FF>specific stage</color> of 
the Combat Trials, 
you can deploy <color=#0055FF>one additional unit</color>.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
아레나 방어 덱 설정에서 <color=#0055FF>방해물 벽</color>을 배치할 수 있습니다. 
벽은 상대의 <color=#0055FF>이동을 유도하니</color> 전략적으로 사용해보세요.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
In the Arena Defense Deck settings, you can place <color=#0055FF>obstacle walls</color>
These walls can <color=#0055FF>influence enemy movement</color>, so be sure to use them strategically.

SpecLanguage.language_kr:
특정 스테이지에는 <color=#0055FF>캐릭터에게 버프</color>를 부여하는 
버프 지역이 존재합니다.
<color=#0055FF>버프 지역 위</color>에 캐릭터가 있어야 버프 효과가 유지됩니다.
SpecLanguage.language_en:
Certain stages feature buff zones that grant <color=#0055FF>buffs to characters.</color>
The buff remains active as long as the character stays within the <color=#0055FF>buff zone.</color>
